name: binja-pwndbg-rpc
description: Live XML-RPC bridge from Binary Ninja to pwndbg/GDB.
longdescription: Provides PluginCommand actions to start/stop a localhost XML-RPC server exposing active BinaryView queries (decomp/IL/calltree/symbol resolution) for pwndbg integration.

installinstructions.Linux: Copy the entire binja_plugin folder into ~/.binaryninja/plugins/ and restart Binary Ninja.
installinstructions.Darwin: Copy the entire binja_plugin folder into ~/Library/Application Support/Binary Ninja/plugins/ and restart Binary Ninja.
installinstructions.Windows: Copy the entire binja_plugin folder into %APPDATA%\\Binary Ninja\\plugins\\ and restart Binary Ninja.

author: nyxFault
